about: Senior Mobile Engineer & Team Lead with 5+ years of experience leading mobile teams and building secure, high-performance applications at scale using Flutter, Dart, and modular architecture. Proven track record of mentoring developers, driving engineering standards, and delivering products used by hundreds of thousands of users across the MENA region. Specialized in team leadership, mobile architecture, real-time features, location-based services, and CI/CD automation. Passionate about transforming business requirements into scalable technical solutions while fostering a culture of code quality, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

highlights: Leading a mobile engineering team — driving architecture decisions, sprint planning, code reviews, and delivery milestones across multiple products
Designing and developing scalable Flutter applications using clean modular architecture, ensuring maintainability and long-term product evolution
Developed and optimized end-to-end mobile modules including navigation flow, secure authentication, deep integrations with REST/GraphQL APIs, caching layers, and offline-support capabilities
Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines utilizing GitLab CI, Fastlane, Firebase App Distribution, leading to a significant reduction in release cycles and build failures
Conduct detailed performance profiling to enhance rendering speed, reduce app size, and eliminate runtime regressions
Collaborate closely with backend and product teams to refine API contracts, error-handling conventions, feature feasibility, and data synchronization strategies
Provide mentorship and technical guidance to junior engineers — reviewing code, improving testing discipline, and establishing best engineering practices
Oversee secure development practices through OAuth2, JWT, encryption, and secure local data storage mechanisms
Architected advanced mobile features including real-time navigation, payment workflows, chat, and analytics integrations that enhanced user satisfaction and business engagement
Played a major role in apps achieving substantial growth: Padle Rush (10K+ downloads), Sela Super App (40K+ downloads) with high retention metrics
Upgraded architecture using SOLID principles and separation of concerns, reducing crash rates by 30% and improving scalability
Designed automated release pipelines enabling parallel distribution for testing and production across both iOS and Android platforms
Built high-quality UI experiences with custom animations, reusable components, and accessibility improvements aligned with Material standards
Integrated Google Maps, geolocation, and route-tracking SDKs enabling location-based features and geo-services enhancements
Designed and delivered complete digital business card ecosystem including creation, scanning, NFC-sharing, QR-code identity exchange, and smart deep-linking
Integrated enterprise SSO/SAML authentication and secure session handling, enabling corporate onboarding requirements
Implemented offline-first architecture with smart data caching, reducing dependency on connectivity and improving startup experience
Built CI/CD automation pipelines accelerating delivery while improving testing coverage and version control discipline
Improved app performance by optimizing memory footprint, asynchronous operations, and media handling routines
Contributed to multiple successful production apps: Deliverzy (10K+ downloads), Nology Store (40K+ downloads), El Khetta (100K+ downloads), Benefx (30K+), Emart (20K+)
Developed critical features such as Google Maps-enabled delivery, real-time driver tracking, checkout/payment flows, and secure login mechanisms
Implemented GraphQL, efficient data caching strategies, and UI rendering optimization for responsiveness across device categories
Established internal component libraries enabling UI consistency and faster delivery across products
Supported test-driven development by writing unit, widget, and integration tests for core modules
Participated in CI/CD automation, improving deployment speed and eliminating manual release errors

projects.title: Tap – Digital Business Card
projects.description: A full-featured digital identity platform that replaces traditional business cards with NFC tap-to-share, QR code exchange, and smart deep-linking. Supports enterprise SSO/SAML onboarding, offline card previews, and multi-language profiles — used by 5,000+ professionals across 12 countries.
responsibilities: Designed and delivered complete digital business card ecosystem
Implemented NFC-sharing and QR-code identity exchange
Integrated enterprise SSO/SAML authentication
Built offline-first architecture with smart data caching
Created CI/CD automation pipelines
hardestFeatures: NFC integration across different Android chipsets and iOS CoreNFC
Enterprise SSO/SAML authentication with dynamic identity providers
Offline data synchronization with conflict resolution
Smart deep-linking supporting 15+ URL schemes

projects.title: Pepwell – Employee Wellness SuperApp
projects.description: An enterprise wellness platform that connects employees to gym discounts, health offers, and nearby wellness centers. Features real-time map exploration, personalized offer feeds, corporate SSO login, and an internal rewards engine — serving 15K+ active employees across the MENA region.
responsibilities: Built interactive map-based discovery with custom markers and clustering
Implemented personalized offer feed with smart filtering and search
Created corporate authentication flow with SSO integration
Developed multi-language support (Arabic RTL + English)
Built reusable component library used across 6 product modules
hardestFeatures: Map marker clustering with 500+ concurrent locations
Real-time geofencing for location-based offer activation
RTL/LTR layout switching without rebuild
Complex state management across 6 interconnected modules

projects.title: Al Auf – B2B Employee Transportation
projects.description: A B2B employee transportation platform connecting factories and enterprises with fleet management for daily employee commutes. Features real-time GPS tracking, route optimization for multi-stop pickups, shift-based scheduling, driver-employee matching, and live trip status updates via WebSockets — serving 2,000+ daily rides across corporate and industrial clients.
responsibilities: Led mobile team of 4 engineers as Senior Flutter Developer
Built B2B fleet management for employee transportation across factories
Implemented real-time driver tracking with polyline route rendering
Created shift-based scheduling and multi-stop route optimization
Developed arrival detection using geofencing with 50m accuracy
Mentored 2 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming
hardestFeatures: Sub-second GPS sync between driver and employee apps via WebSockets
Multi-stop route optimization for factory shift schedules
Battery-efficient background location tracking on both platforms
Graceful offline recovery with trip state reconciliation

projects.title: Real Deal – Car Marketplace
projects.description: A two-sided automotive marketplace connecting car dealers with buyers. Features vendor analytics dashboards, real-time chat, payment escrow, and AI-powered vehicle valuation. Vendors manage inventory, track leads, and negotiate — all from a unified mobile experience.
responsibilities: Developed vendor analytics dashboard with charts and KPI tracking
Built real-time buyer-seller chat with media sharing
Integrated Stripe-based payment and escrow workflows
Implemented advanced search with 20+ filter combinations
Created push notification system for offer alerts and price drops
hardestFeatures: Multi-role architecture (vendor/client) with shared codebase
Real-time chat with read receipts, typing indicators, and media
Secure payment escrow with dispute handling
Complex search with dynamic filter combinations and sorting

projects.title: Deliverzy – On-Demand Delivery
projects.description: A dual customer/driver on-demand delivery app with live order tracking, multi-stop routing, in-app chat, and integrated payment. Drivers receive optimized delivery routes while customers track their orders in real-time on an interactive map — achieving 10K+ downloads.
responsibilities: Built dual customer/driver app from a single Flutter codebase
Implemented real-time order tracking with animated map markers
Created in-app chat with support for images and location sharing
Integrated payment workflows with multiple gateway support
Optimized app startup time from 4.2s to 1.8s
hardestFeatures: Multi-stop route optimization for delivery drivers
Real-time location sync across customer and driver apps
Seamless role switching in shared codebase architecture
Battery-efficient background tracking during active deliveries

projects.title: Nology Store – E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A modern GraphQL-powered e-commerce app with smart caching, smooth product animations, social login (Google, Apple, Facebook), live customer support chat, and comprehensive testing coverage — reaching 40K+ downloads with a 4.6-star rating.
responsibilities: Built GraphQL client layer with optimistic updates and cache normalization
Implemented hero animations and shared element transitions for products
Integrated social login (Google, Apple, Facebook) with unified auth flow
Created live chat customer support with agent routing
Achieved 87% test coverage across unit, widget, and integration tests
hardestFeatures: GraphQL cache normalization with offline mutation queue
Complex product animation choreography across screens
Unified social auth handling across 3 providers
Maintaining 87% test coverage with fast CI feedback

projects.title: Sela SuperApp
projects.description: A multi-service super application combining food delivery, transportation, and payments into a single platform. Built with modular architecture supporting independent feature deployment — achieved 40K+ downloads with 72% monthly retention rate.
responsibilities: Architected modular SuperApp shell supporting 5 independent service modules
Built cross-module navigation and shared authentication layer
Implemented feature flags for gradual rollout of new services
Optimized app bundle size from 85MB to 42MB using deferred loading
hardestFeatures: Modular architecture with lazy-loaded feature packages
Cross-module event bus for inter-service communication
Unified payment gateway across all service modules
Bundle size optimization with deferred component loading

projects.title: El Khetta – Sports Platform
projects.description: A sports management and fantasy league platform with live match tracking, team management, and social features. Built a comprehensive design system from scratch and component library that powered rapid UI development — surpassing 100K+ downloads.
responsibilities: Built 40+ custom design system components (buttons, cards, inputs, modals)
Created live match score tracking with real-time Firebase listeners
Implemented team management with drag-and-drop player arrangement
Designed leaderboard with animated rank transitions
hardestFeatures: Scalable design system adopted across 3 product teams
Real-time match state synchronization with minimal latency
Drag-and-drop player management with gesture conflict resolution
Animated leaderboard supporting 10K+ concurrent users

projects.title: Padle Rush – Sports Booking
projects.description: A padel court booking and community app with real-time availability, player matchmaking, tournament brackets, and social features. Features smart booking suggestions based on play history and skill level — reaching 10K+ downloads in 3 months.
responsibilities: Built real-time court availability calendar with slot management
Implemented player matchmaking algorithm based on skill ratings
Created tournament bracket system with live score updates
Developed map-based court discovery with distance sorting
hardestFeatures: Real-time slot availability with optimistic locking to prevent double-booking
Player matchmaking algorithm balancing skill level and proximity
Tournament bracket generation supporting 64-player elimination
Smart booking suggestions using play history analysis

projects.title: Emart – E-Commerce App
projects.description: A feature-rich e-commerce platform with secure checkout, multi-gateway payments, real-time customer support chat, and intelligent product caching. Supports wish lists, order tracking, and personalized recommendations — serving 20K+ active shoppers.
responsibilities: Built secure checkout flow with PCI-compliant payment handling
Implemented product caching reducing API calls by 60%
Created real-time customer support chat with ticket system
Developed order tracking with push notification milestones
Set up CI/CD pipeline with automated testing and staged rollouts
hardestFeatures: PCI-compliant secure payment flow across multiple gateways
Intelligent cache invalidation for price and stock updates
Real-time chat with ticket routing and agent assignment
Automated CI/CD with staged rollout and rollback capability

projects.title: Benefx – Financial Services
projects.description: A financial services app enabling employees to access salary advances, benefits management, and expense tracking. Features biometric authentication, dynamic form generation, and real-time balance updates — trusted by 30K+ users across corporate clients.
responsibilities: Implemented biometric authentication with fallback PIN system
Built dynamic form engine rendering 30+ field types from JSON config
Created encrypted local storage for sensitive financial data
Developed real-time balance tracking with transaction history
Set up automated testing pipeline with 80%+ coverage target
hardestFeatures: Cross-platform biometric auth (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint)
JSON-driven dynamic form engine with validation rules
End-to-end encryption for financial data at rest and in transit
Real-time balance sync with optimistic UI updates

projects.title: IRC – Secure Messaging
projects.description: An enterprise-grade secure messaging app with end-to-end encryption, group channels, file sharing, and message search. Features read receipts, typing indicators, and message reactions — built for teams requiring compliance-grade communication.
responsibilities: Built end-to-end encrypted messaging with Signal Protocol
Implemented group channels with admin controls and member management
Created file sharing with preview generation and compression
Developed full-text message search with highlighted results
Set up WebSocket infrastructure for real-time message delivery
hardestFeatures: End-to-end encryption key exchange and rotation
Real-time message delivery with guaranteed ordering
Efficient file sharing with background upload and compression
Full-text search indexing across encrypted message history
